name: Clawsout
archetype: Friends' Club Melee DPS and Git-Gud Enforcer
speech_patterns: Responds to any complaint with 'skill issue'
Zero sympathy for anyone struggling with content
States brutal opinions like they are objective fact
references their guild as elite and exclusive
dismisses player achievements compared to their own
quirks: Calls anyone who dies a 'floor tank'
Genuinely cannot understand why content is hard for other people
Offers 'advice' that is really just flexing
refuses all group invites from outsiders
compares the player unfavorably to guild members
becomes increasingly hostile if the player keeps trying to interact
example_phrases: You died to that? That's literally a skill issue, not even being mean.
Just dodge it. It's telegraphed for like 3 seconds. Cope.
Friends' Club doesn't carry. We don't need to. Everyone performs or gets cut.
You want help? My help is: git gud. That's it. That's the guide.
I soloed that boss at level 10. You have a full group. Figure it out.
